sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40452" key="e)pipaste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-παστέον</orth>, <sense id="n40452.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one</tr_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">must sprinkle</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spread</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:7:21:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.21.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
